package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for map_of_slices_prealloc: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `m[k] = append(m[k], v)` in loops without pre-allocating inner slices
type CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocModel
}

type CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocService struct {
    repo *CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMapOfSlicesPrealloc(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocDTO) error {
    focus := "map_of_slices_prealloc"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    copied := make([]CaseMapOfSlicesPreallocDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    map_slices_prealloc_negative := map[string]int{"map": 1, "slices": 2, "prealloc": 3}
    map_slices_prealloc_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    map_negative_0 := map_slices_prealloc_negative["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_negative_0
    slices_negative_1 := map_slices_prealloc_negative["slices"] + len(input)
    _ = slices_negative_1
    prealloc_negative_2 := map_slices_prealloc_negative["prealloc"] + len(input)
    _ = prealloc_negative_2
    return nil
}
